items.description: TISS is a weekly podcast where Aadar, Neville, Kautuk and Varun discuss random, fun, stupid, pointless, weird, shocking "facts" they find on the internet. So come learn with them...or something like that. In the 91st episode, the boys share their favourite exam stories! Buy Tickets for Kautuk's show 'Working on The Vaccine' for June: https://bit.ly/3cT1xo9​ TISS Shorts is now LIVE. Subscribe, comment, like, share, enjoy previous episodes of the podcast. New episodes soon!: https://bit.ly/3tUdLTC Check out the TISS Sub-Reddit: https://bit.ly/2IEi0Qs​​​​​​​​​​​ Check out the TISS Discord: https://discord.gg/UyDWVCpGUx​​​​​​ Buy Varun Thakur's 420 Merch - http://bit.ly/2oDkhRV​​​​​​​​​​​ Follow Us on Instagram. Varun - https://www.instagram.com/varunthakur... Aadar - https://www.instagram.com/theaadarguy... Neville - https://www.instagram.com/nevilleshah... Kautuk - https://www.instagram.com/cowtuk/​​​​...
items.title: The Internet Said So | Ep 91 | Exams
